title: Alternative Punishments
description: An alternative to losing your items.
body:
Do you heavily dislike needing to retrieve your items and EXP after every death, but you feel that using keep inventory is cheaty?

Alternative Punishments is a mod that adds a different punishment for death- losing your max health. This may sound bad, however, it really isn't. Each death, you lose 1 heart, up to a maximum of 5. If you eat a Golden Apple, you regain a heart. If you eat an Enchanted Golden Apple, all of your health will be restored.

This mod currently forces your world to have keep inventory on. I plan to make this a config.

Planned Features:
- Dedicated antidote item
- Force keep inventory config
- Antidote heal amount config
- Health to remove on death config
